/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/Skadoosh.dir/Skadoosh_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Skadoosh.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Skadoosh.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o Skadoosh  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
